vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is in a state of total failure. There is no evidence of living plant tissue in any of the pots. The 'White Rabbit' anchor is the only remaining identifier of the original setup.
vision_report.anomalies: The primary anomaly is the complete absence of the registered plants. The lighting environment has deteriorated to a point where the desk surface is barely discernible.
vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a chronological audit of the provided image sequence. My first action was to calibrate the visual field against the provided registry. Upon validation, I have determined that the biome has suffered a total systemic loss. The pots are present, but the botanical occupants are missing or dead. The lighting environment has progressively worsened, further obscuring the soil surface. There is no evidence of life.
